title: sideritis huber-morathii
intro: Sideritis huber-morathii, also known as Turkish mountain tea, is a plant species belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Sideritis huber-morathii can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used as a supplement in capsule or tincture form.
